prompt: 以你對我的 memory 了解 我要在github 上放一些 我覺得可以證明我能力的東西  你覺得會是甚麼

input.command: echo "=== .claude/rules ===" && ls -la .claude/rules/ 2>/dev/null && echo "=== handover/registry ===" && ls -la handover/registry/ 2>/dev/null && echo "=== handover/scripts ===" && ls handover/scripts/ 2>/dev/null && echo "=== registry_hook ===" && find .claude handover -iname "*registry*hook*" 2>/dev/null
input.description: Verify rules, registry, hook files exist

input.command: echo "=== fw-multi-agent repo ===" && ls fw-multi-agent/ 2>/dev/null && echo "=== git remote ===" && git -C fw-multi-agent remote -v 2>/dev/null && echo "=== is public? ===" && echo "=== .claude/skills ===" && ls .claude/skills/ 2>/dev/null
echo "=== qa-log-patterns dir ===" && ls -la .claude/skills/qa-log-patterns/ && echo && echo "=== skill.md head ===" && head -60 .claude/skills/qa-log-patterns/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -80

prompt:
<task-notification>
<summary>Handover missing - write it now</summary>
</task-notification>
<system-reminder>
Session handover was never written this session. latest-mybot.md was NOT updated this session (last written 2026-07-22 10:45). The archived handover is stale; the auto-generated audit at sessions/mybot/2026-07-22-1050-audit.md is the only real record.

Write the real handover to D:\mybot\handover\latest-mybot.md now (what was done, what is unfinished, next step), using sessions/mybot/2026-07-22-1050-audit.md as the source of truth.

</system-reminder>

input.command: echo "=== audit source ===" && cat "D:/mybot/handover/sessions/mybot/2026-07-22-1050-audit.md" 2>/dev/null && echo && echo "=== current latest-mybot.md ===" && cat "D:/mybot/handover/latest-mybot.md" 2>/dev/null | head -60
input.description: Read audit source and current latest handover
